history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. The safe path is to move right to D02, then go down to D03 and D04. The first step is to move forward into the safe cell at C02.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2 column B, facing right (">"). The cell directly ahead is C2, which is a floor cell (safe). Moving forward will take me to C2, from where I can continue towards the goal at D4.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing right (">"). The goal is at row 04, column D, below me. To move downward, I need to face down. Rotating clockwise from right will orient me to face down. Once facing down, the path is clear: cells (03, D) and (04, D) are safe (floor and goal). So my first step should be to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead is row 03, column D, which is a floor tile (`.`). Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing down (v). The cell directly in front of me is row 04, column D, which contains the goal (G). Moving forward will take me to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
